name: watch-later-docs
description: Automation helpers for docs SEO/schema checks

scripts.build: npm run build:tailwind && bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.build:seo: npm run rating:update && npm run build:tailwind && JEKYLL_ENV=production bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.serve:dev: npm run rating:update && npm run build:tailwind && bundle exec jekyll serve --config _config.yml,_config_dev.yml --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000
